input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.2.7 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.2.7
            TITLE: chain drive - scatter shields for chains must:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.2.7: Chain Drive - Scatter shields for chains must:
T.5.2.7 Chain Drive - Scatter shields for chains must: 
a. Be made of 2.66 mm (0.105 inch) minimum thickness steel (no alternatives are allowed)
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 67 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023 
b. Have a minimum width equal to three times the width of the chain 
c. Be centered on the center line of the chain  
d. Stay aligned with the chain under all conditions

final_answer: rule T.5.2.7: Chain Drive - Scatter shields for chains must: T.5.2.7 Chain Drive - Scatter shields for chains must: a. Be made of 2.66 mm (0.105 inch) minimum thickness steel (no alternatives are allowed) b. Have a minimum width equal to three times the width of the chain c. Be centered on the center line of the chain d. Stay aligned with the chain under all conditions
